summary: Iteration 83 - Backend modularization and country filter fix testing. Found and FIXED a critical bug: missing @router.get decorator on /products/{product_id} endpoint in products.py. All 17 backend tests passed after fix. All frontend tests passed for conservas link fix and expanded country dropdown.

bugs_found_and_fixed.description: During modularization, the decorator was accidentally removed. GET /api/products/{product_id} returned 405 Method Not Allowed
bugs_found_and_fixed.fix: Added @router.get('/products/{product_id}') decorator and missing imports (asyncio, require_role, TRANSLATION_LANGUAGES)

passed_tests: BACKEND: API health check (/api/health) - returns ok
BACKEND: GET /api/products returns product list (9 products)
BACKEND: GET /api/products?origin_country=Spain returns 7 products (CRITICAL FIX VERIFIED)
BACKEND: POST /api/influencer/apply endpoint exists (validation error as expected)
FRONTEND: Homepage conservas link points to /products?category=conservas (NOT fruta-verdura)
FRONTEND: Products page loads with country filter dropdown
FRONTEND: Country dropdown has 51 options (50 countries + All Origins)
FRONTEND: Spain option exists in dropdown
FRONTEND: Conservas category shows 2 products (Traditional Fig Jam, Sun-Dried Tomatoes)
critical_code_review_comments: routes/products.py was missing @router.get decorator on get_product function - FIXED
routes/products.py was missing imports for asyncio, require_role, TRANSLATION_LANGUAGES - FIXED
Country filter fix verified: query['country_origin'] correctly matches DB field
Homepage conservas link correctly points to /products?category=conservas
ProductsPage.js has 50 countries in countryOptions array (lines 123-178)
All 7 extracted route modules (products, cart, recipes_reviews, influencer, insights, directory, internal_chat) are working correctly
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 83 verified backend modularization. IMPORTANT: Fixed missing @router.get('/products/{product_id}') decorator in routes/products.py. Country filter fix (origin_country -> country_origin in query) is working - 7 products from Spain. Homepage conservas link fixed (now /products?category=conservas). Country dropdown expanded to 50 countries. All extracted route modules working: products, cart, recipes_reviews, influencer. Testing was done on https://auth-rework.preview.emergentagent.com.

conservas_link_fix.verified: Category shows 2 products: Traditional Fig Jam, Sun-Dried Tomatoes
